text: - H. Waiver of Subrogation. All insurance  coverage  carried  by  Subcontractor,  whether  required  herein  or  not, shall provide a waiver of subrogation in favor of Contractor Parties. Contractor and Subcontractor waive all rights against each other and each of their subcontractors, sub-subcontractors, officers, directors, agents, and employees  for  recovery  for  damages  caused  by  fire  and  other  causes  of  loss  to  the  extent  covered  by insurance, Builder's Risk, or any other property insurance applicableto the Work.
